archetype: Archetype 6 (Vibrant Play) blended with Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft)

typography.strategy: Modern, energetic, and clean. 'Outfit' provides a geometric, friendly yet professional voice for headings, avoiding the overused Inter/Roboto. 'DM Sans' offers excellent readability for product names, pricing, and descriptions. Headings should be tracking-tight.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Generous spacing, clean lines, and soft radii to feel youthful yet highly functional. Use an asymmetric bento or strict grid depending on the section.
layout_and_spacing.main_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-8 pt-8 pb-16
layout_and_spacing.product_grid: md:col-span-3 grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-gray-200 sticky top-0 z-50 transition-all
surface_strategies.product_card: Solid white surface (#FFFFFF) with a delicate 1px border (border-gray-200). On hover: translate-y-[-4px], subtle shadow-xl, border color darkens slightly. Inner image container should have rounded-xl and gray-100 background to ensure product pops.
surface_strategies.sidebar_container: Transparent background with logical grouping. No heavy boxing to keep the UI light.

navigation_bar.rules: Must be visible on desktop. Search bar should be prominent and centered. Cart icon must feature a visible, brightly colored counter badge (e.g., yellow or red) that updates dynamically.

sidebar_filters.rules: Use Shadcn Checkbox or Toggle Group. Labels must be text-sm font-medium text-gray-700. Provide clear 'active' states for selected filters.

product_card.rules: Image aspect ratio 1:1, object-cover or object-contain with light gray background. Category badge small and uppercase (text-xs tracking-wider). Price formatted as $ XXX.XX. Add to cart button uses primary color, spans full width or sits at bottom right, must have a clear hover state.

product_detail_page.rules: Should be a distinct view (route or large modal). Split layout: Image left (col-span-1 md:col-span-2), Details right (col-span-1 md:col-span-1). Use generous leading for description text.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Buttons and links must have explicit hover states (e.g., hover:bg-blue-700). Cards should lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and gain shadow.
motion_and_interactions.click: Active states on buttons (scale down slightly or change color).
motion_and_interactions.cart_update: When 'Añadir al carrito' is clicked, trigger a small pulse animation on the cart counter badge and optionally show a Sonner toast notification.

icons_and_assets.sizing: w-5 h-5 for standard icons, w-6 h-6 for header icons

marroquineria.description: Purple kids backpack with plush toys

jugueteria.description: Colorful wooden educational toys on shelf

oficina.description: Top view of office desk with stationery
Pens, markers, and sticky notes on desk

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons.
Apply 'Outfit' font for all headings (H1-H4) and 'DM Sans' for body text. Add these to Tailwind config.
Implement a layout with a fixed/sticky header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80), a left sidebar for filters, and a main product grid.
Currency must be formatted in ARS ($ XXX.XX). Ensure locale strings are in Spanish.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements as defined in the components section.
Use the provided media URLs to populate the initial product catalog dynamically.
Ensure the 'Añadir al carrito' button has clear interactive states and updates the cart counter in the header.
Avoid any brown, wood, or vintage library colors. Strictly stick to the defined vibrant palette (Blue, Yellow, Green, White, Light Gray).
